message:
fix(db): improve database connection lifecycle management

Three related fixes for proper database connection handling:

- CLI (lib.rs): Wrap raw connection opens with guard_db_conn() in
  check_inbox_direct and fetch_mail_inbox_direct_with_database_url so
  that metadata connections are automatically closed when the guard
  drops, preventing connection leaks on early-return paths.

- DB (lib.rs): Replace no-op drop in close_db_conn with an explicit
  close_sync() call that logs a warning on failure, ensuring SQLite WAL
  checkpoints and file handles are released deterministically rather
  than relying on Drop ordering.

- Sync (sync.rs): Add explicit close_db_conn call after
  mark_messages_read_batch_sync completes so the short-lived connection
  opened for the batch update is promptly returned to the OS instead of
  lingering until scope exit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
